properties.Proposed interventions for development: Blue marble Rock at the remote village of Rupaha at Walapane is a unique rock rarely found elsewhere in the world. In fact, it is said that this is the only such rock in South Asia. It is already a tourist attraction.
properties.Field Manager's Recommendation (i.e Stra: It is sufficient to install a notice board at the start of the access road to visit the Blue marble rock.

properties.How to Promote (Development Works/Preven: Construction of view Point, Advertising and Infrastructure Development
properties.Proposed interventions for development: A natural flowing stream. There is no road to reach to the stream. There is no need to promote it as a tourist spot or make it a view point.
